# generationMarker

**Instance Property**

A value specific to your data source identifying the database generation you’re enumerating for changes.

## Declaration

```swift
var generationMarker: Data
```

## Inspecting sync anchor properties

- **offset**: An offset from the anchor’s generation marker.

items.description: An offset from the anchor’s generation marker.
